title: TrainingLoopMeta
description: Machine-learning-inspired training metrics schema for the unified behavioral quality system (v2.1). Stored at config/training-loop/meta.json.

version.description: Schema version. Increment when breaking changes are introduced.

sessions.description: Total number of substantive sessions processed.

last_session.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent session.

last_optimized.description: Human-readable note about the last optimization action taken.

ema_lambda.description: EMA decay factor. Default 2/(10+1) yields effective memory of ~10 sessions.

f1_target.description: Target F1 score. Dimensions below this trigger threshold adjustment.

min_adjust_interval.description: Minimum sessions between automatic threshold adjustments to prevent thrashing.

complexity_gamma.description: Weight of the complexity penalty in the total loss.

min_signals_for_adjustment.description: Minimum total signals (TP+FP+FN) per dimension before threshold adjustment can trigger.

adjustment_enabled.description: Master kill-switch for automatic threshold adjustment. When false, system is in L0 (report-only) mode.

dimensions.description: Per-dimension state. Keys: skill, multiagent, toolcall.

dimension.description: State for a single training dimension (SkillOpt, MultiAgentOpt, or ToolCallOpt).

fn.description: False Negatives: correct action required but not taken.

has_data.description: Whether any signals (TP+FP+FN) exist for this dimension. When false, precision/recall/f1 are None.

ema.description: Exponentially weighted moving averages for smoothed trajectories.

last_updated_session.description: Session index when EMA was last updated.

last_signal_count.description: Total signal count (TP+FP+FN) when EMA was last updated. Used for signal-count EMA: EMA only updates when this increases.

complexity.description: Complexity tracking for the complexity penalty term.

current.description: Observed average invocations/dispatches/calls per session. Populate via harness instrumentation.

target.description: Desirable baseline per session. Defaults: skill=2.0, multiagent=0.5, toolcall=8.0.

threshold.description: Legacy v1 alert threshold (number of signals before SessionStart injection). Retained for backward compatibility.

threshold_config.description: Machine-readable config location for dimensions with numeric tunable thresholds (e.g. multiagent).

config_file.description: Absolute path to the file containing the threshold variable.

config_pattern.description: Regex or variable name used to locate the threshold in config_file.

last_adjusted_session.description: Session index when an automatic threshold adjustment was last applied.

last_optimized.description: Human-readable note about the last optimization for this dimension.
